args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY business_ref;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY business_ref;

args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
biz = pd.DataFrame(var_call_EgyBcG320LlFpjkQ6ZbIdwcS)
# categories may be missing; treat as None
if 'categories' not in biz.columns:
    biz['categories'] = None
# explode categories: string with commas
biz['categories_list'] = biz['categories'].apply(lambda x: [] if x is None else ([c.strip() for c in x.split(',')] if isinstance(x,str) else (x if isinstance(x,list) else [])))
expl = biz[['business_id','categories_list']].explode('categories_list').rename(columns={'categories_list':'category'})
expl = expl[expl['category'].notna() & (expl['category']!='')]
# count businesses per category
counts = expl.groupby('category')['business_id'].nunique().reset_index(name='business_count')
# map avg rating per business
rev = pd.DataFrame(var_call_vz2guXlyHfhMEym7EKepLSqP)
rev['business_id'] = rev['business_ref'].str.replace('businessref_','businessid_', regex=False)
rev['avg_rating'] = rev['avg_rating'].astype(float)
# join category-business to ratings
cat_biz = expl.merge(rev[['business_id','avg_rating']], on='business_id', how='left')
cat_stats = cat_biz.groupby('category').agg(business_count=('business_id','nunique'), avg_rating=('avg_rating','mean')).reset_index()
# pick category with max business_count
max_count = cat_stats['business_count'].max()
top = cat_stats[cat_stats['business_count']==max_count].sort_values(['avg_rating','category'], ascending=[False, True]).head(1)
res = {
    'category': top.iloc[0]['category'] if len(top) else None,
    'business_count': int(top.iloc[0]['business_count']) if len(top) else 0,
    'average_rating': float(top.iloc[0]['avg_rating']) if len(top) else None
}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res))

biz = pd.DataFrame(var_call_EgyBcG320LlFpjkQ6ZbIdwcS)
# categories may be missing; treat as None
if 'categories' not in biz.columns:
    biz['categories'] = None
# explode categories: string with commas
biz['categories_list'] = biz['categories'].apply(lambda x: [] if x is None else ([c.strip() for c in x.split(',')] if isinstance(x,str) else (x if isinstance(x,list) else [])))
expl = biz[['business_id','categories_list']].explode('categories_list').rename(columns={'categories_list':'category'})
expl = expl[expl['category'].notna() & (expl['category']!='')]
# count businesses per category
counts = expl.groupby('category')['business_id'].nunique().reset_index(name='business_count')
# map avg rating per business
rev = pd.DataFrame(var_call_vz2guXlyHfhMEym7EKepLSqP)
rev['business_id'] = rev['business_ref'].str.replace('businessref_','businessid_', regex=False)
rev['avg_rating'] = rev['avg_rating'].astype(float)
# join category-business to ratings
cat_biz = expl.merge(rev[['business_id','avg_rating']], on='business_id', how='left')
cat_stats = cat_biz.groupby('category').agg(business_count=('business_id','nunique'), avg_rating=('avg_rating','mean')).reset_index()
# pick category with max business_count
max_count = cat_stats['business_count'].max()
top = cat_stats[cat_stats['business_count']==max_count].sort_values(['avg_rating','category'], ascending=[False, True]).head(1)
res = {
    'category': top.iloc[0]['category'] if len(top) else None,
    'business_count': int(top.iloc[0]['business_count']) if len(top) else 0,
    'average_rating': float(top.iloc[0]['avg_rating']) if len(top) else None
}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res))
